dirt_road.name: Dirt Road
dirt_road.description: Basic road for vehicle transport. Allows goods to be moved between facilities.

cobblestone_road.name: Cobblestone Road
cobblestone_road.description: Improved road with faster transport speed.

agri_road_dirt.name: Farm Road
agri_road_dirt.description: Agricultural-only dirt road for connecting fields and orchards to the farmhouse and main logistics network. Built by Agri corp; functionality will diverge from standard roads (e.g. lower vehicle speed, no through-traffic) — to be specified.
